untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-instrument spread analysis with implied volatility comparison, standard deviation calculations relative to fair value, and percentile rank analysis of spread relationships. The backtest engine indicators provided are single-instrument technical indicators only. Required functionality: (1) relative mispricing detection between paired instruments, (2) implied volatility surface analysis, (3) fair value models, (4) statistical percentile ranking of spreads, and (5) cross-instrument correlation monitoring. None of these can be constructed from the allowed single-instrument price/volume/technical indicators.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_1 is a relative value / statistical arbitrage strategy requiring multi-leg spread analysis and volatility surface data. This is fundamentally incompatible with a single-instrument technical indicator framework. The signal would require: (a) volatility data (implied vs realized), (b) paired instrument price feeds, (c) statistical models for mean reversion detection, and (d) dynamic fair value calculation. To implement this strategy, a spread-capable backtester with access to volatility surfaces and multi-leg position tracking would be required.
